summary.business_type: B2B Marketing Agency (services, sectoral solutions, productized subscriptions, training/courses, 1:1 consulting) — bilingual TR/EN, React/Vite SPA with server-side prerendering, PHP+Node dual backend, Cloudflare edge
top_findings: CRITICAL: Cloudflare WAF/Bot Management is returning HTTP 403 to real requests from ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Perplexity-User, anthropic-ai, and cohere-ai at the network edge — independent of and prior to robots.txt being consulted. This silently defeats the site's llms.txt/AI-Answer-Box/schema investment for several major AI platforms.

CRITICAL: robots.txt contains a genuine self-contradiction — a Cloudflare-managed 'Disallow: /' block and a hand-written 'Allow: /' block both target the same AI user-agent tokens (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, Google-Extended, Applebot-Extended, Amazonbot, Meta-ExternalAgent) in one file. Parser behavior is vendor-dependent.

CRITICAL: Site-wide soft-404 — any unmatched path returns HTTP 200 with the TR homepage's HTML, index,follow meta robots, and a canonical pointing to the homepage. Verified with random slugs, case-variants, and guessed EN URLs.

HIGH: ~85% of the 18 sectoral pages are templated boilerplate — nav/footer/service-training-product lists identical, and 5 of 6 FAQ Q&As copied verbatim across pages, with only ~250-400 unique words per page. Scaled/doorway-page risk.

HIGH: LCP fails Google's 'Good' threshold (≤2.5s) on every page tested (6.5s-22s), worsening sharply with template depth; a sectoral page template has an outright CLS failure (0.854) plus a 9MB/299-request payload.
HIGH: BreadcrumbList schema mis-parents Consulting under Trainings, and every product page's breadcrumb is hardcoded to Maestro AI's URL regardless of the actual product.
HIGH: Cookie-consent banner overlaps the primary hero CTA on first paint (desktop+mobile+interior pages) — the real first-clickable element is the cookie banner, not the marketing CTA.
quick_wins: Flip Cloudflare's AI Crawl Control / Bot Management managed rule to Allow for ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Perplexity-User, anthropic-ai, cohere-ai (dashboard change, no code)
Consolidate robots.txt into one directive block per user-agent (removes the self-contradiction)
Add the consulting/consultants section (/danismanlik, /danismanlar, /en/consulting, /en/consultants) to the sitemap — it's live, indexable content currently absent from all 6 sub-sitemaps
Fix the product-page BreadcrumbList hardcoded Maestro AI URL bug — one template fix, sitewide impact
Remove deprecated HowTo schema (no SERP benefit since Sept 2023)
Fix cookie-banner/hero-CTA overlap and the 375px hamburger-button clipping bug
Unify info@khilon.com vs info@khilonfast.com contact email inconsistency

categories.name: Technical SEO
what_works: Sitemap/hreflang reciprocity across TR/EN pairs
Self-referencing canonicals, clean URL structure
Full baseline security headers (HSTS, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy)
Viewport meta present, image width/height set (good CLS hygiene)
Consistent TTFB 300-400ms (Cloudflare edge + prerendering working)

findings.title: Site-wide soft-404
findings.description: Any unmatched path (random slug, case-variant of a real URL, guessed EN URL) returns HTTP 200 with the TR homepage HTML, index,follow meta robots, and homepage canonical.
findings.recommendation: Return a real 404 status from the SPA fallback/edge worker instead of serving homepage content for unmatched routes.

findings.title: robots.txt self-contradiction
findings.description: Cloudflare-managed 'Disallow: /' block and a hand-written 'Allow: /' block both exist for the same AI user-agent tokens in one file; parser behavior is vendor-dependent (first-match-wins vs least-restrictive-wins).
findings.recommendation: Fix at the source: adjust Cloudflare's AI Crawl Control dashboard toggle per-bot instead of hand-editing text around its auto-injected block, so the file ends up with one directive group per user-agent.

findings.title: CSP is Report-Only with no reporting endpoint
findings.description: Content-Security-Policy-Report-Only is sent but there's no report-to/report-uri collecting violations, so it provides neither real protection nor visibility.
findings.recommendation: Add a reporting endpoint, run a burn-in period reviewing violations, then promote to an enforced Content-Security-Policy.

findings.title: No canonical-host redirect
findings.description: http:// and www. both serve 200 directly instead of a 301 to the canonical https apex.
findings.recommendation: Add a Cloudflare redirect rule collapsing all host/scheme variants to the canonical apex.

findings.title: Pages not edge-cached
findings.description: cf-cache-status returns DYNAMIC on prerendered HTML, inflating TTFB ~0.5-0.85s versus a cached hit.
findings.recommendation: Add a Cache Rule/Page Rule to cache prerendered HTML at the edge with appropriate purge-on-deploy.

findings.title: IndexNow not implemented
findings.description: No IndexNow protocol support for Bing/Yandex/Naver instant-indexing.
findings.recommendation: Implement IndexNow ping on publish/update for faster non-Google indexation.

findings.title: Render-blocking unrelated CSS
findings.description: A 9.2KB pdf-*.css loads render-blocking on pages without any PDF viewer.
findings.recommendation: Scope the PDF-viewer stylesheet to only load on pages that use it.

findings.title: Missing fetchpriority on LCP images
findings.description: Hero images lack fetchpriority="high".
findings.recommendation: Add fetchpriority="high" to above-the-fold hero images.

categories.name: Content Quality
what_works: Prerendered SPA delivers full text (880-1,780 words/page) with no JS execution needed — thin content is not the binding problem
AI Answer Box (direct-answer paragraph under H1) present and well-formed on every sampled page type
FAQPage/Question/Answer + BreadcrumbList JSON-LD correctly implemented sitewide

findings.title: Sectoral pages ~85% templated boilerplate
findings.description: Diffed 3 of ~18 sectoral pages line-for-line: nav/footer/service-training-product lists identical, section order identical, 5 of 6 FAQ Q&As copied verbatim (only the first question sector-customized). Unique content ~250-400 words out of 1,100-1,580 total. Training pages show the same pattern.
findings.recommendation: Make sectoral/training FAQs genuinely vertical-specific; expand the unique-content block per page; consider a seo-programmatic review for a full scaled-content verdict.

findings.title: Weak Experience/Authoritativeness signals
findings.description: No real case studies with verifiable client metrics; single-line testimonials swap names in lockstep with the sector template (e.g. different name/company per page but same structure). Named expert 'Bora Işık' invoked repeatedly for training credibility with no bio page, credentials, or Person schema.
findings.recommendation: Add real named case studies with metrics; build a credible author/expert bio page with Person schema for Bora Işık.

findings.title: Contact email inconsistency
findings.description: Both info@khilon.com and info@khilonfast.com appear on the site — a legacy-rebrand trust flag.
findings.recommendation: Standardize on info@khilonfast.com everywhere.

findings.title: Synthetic freshness signals
findings.description: dateModified is a single sitewide build-time value, not per-page edit history; sitemap lastmod for distinct sectoral URLs shares identical batch timestamps.
findings.recommendation: Derive dateModified from real content-edit timestamps per page.

findings.title: AI Answer Box not schema-wrapped
findings.description: The answer-box paragraph isn't itself wrapped in Question/Answer schema and isn't a semantic heading.
findings.recommendation: Wrap the answer box in FAQPage/Question schema and use a semantic heading tag.

categories.name: On-Page / Search Experience (SXO)
what_works: Consulting drill-down pages are the strongest page type checked: clear pricing, 11-module curriculum, FAQ, testimonial
Energy sector page ranks (#2 observed) for its head term

findings.title: Page-type/intent mismatch on content-strategy service page
findings.description: The '/hizmetlerimiz/icerik-stratejisi' page is a pure sales page, but its likely head term 'içerik stratejisi nedir' has a SERP 100% dominated by informational 'nedir + nasıl oluşturulur' educational content.
findings.recommendation: Add an upfront educational/definitional block before the sales pitch, or create a separate informational pillar page that links to the service page.

findings.title: No price shown on training/course pages
findings.description: The Teknoloji & Yazılım course page shows zero price anywhere in static HTML; CTA links to an empty #pricing anchor — unlike every competitor course-catalog page and unlike khilonfast's own consulting pages which do show '5.000 USD/tek seferlik'.
findings.recommendation: Add visible pricing to all training/course pages, matching the consulting page pattern.

findings.title: No named case studies or client logos on any sampled page type
findings.description: Trust signals are thin across homepage, service, sectoral, training, and consulting pages.
findings.recommendation: Single highest-leverage fix: add real client logos and named case studies with metrics.

findings.title: Homepage doesn't rank for its own head term
findings.description: Homepage doesn't appear in top-10 for 'B2B pazarlama ajansı'; H1 is a slogan rather than a descriptive, keyword-bearing statement.
findings.recommendation: Consider a descriptive H1 variant or supporting subhead carrying the target phrase.

findings.title: Booking/checkout flow not exercisable in static analysis
findings.description: The JS-driven 'Başlayın' button flow could not be tested without a browser renderer in this environment.
findings.recommendation: Manual QA pass on the live booking/checkout flow recommended.

categories.name: Schema / Structured Data
what_works: All schema server-rendered and valid JSON — no syntax errors across 21+ pages sampled
JSON-LD only, correct https://schema.org context, ISO 8601 dateModified
Real verified sameAs links (LinkedIn/Instagram both HTTP 200, not placeholders)
FAQPage correctly present and content-accurate sitewide; earlier lazy-mount empty-schema bug does not reproduce

findings.title: Deprecated HowTo schema still live
findings.description: The 'how khilonfast works' page (TR+EN) still ships HowTo schema, removed from Google SERP features since September 2023.
findings.recommendation: Delete the HowTo schema block; it provides no benefit and is dead weight.

findings.title: BreadcrumbList mis-parents Consulting under Trainings
findings.description: /danismanlik and /en/consulting show a breadcrumb implying Consulting is a child of Trainings, despite being its own top-level offering.
findings.recommendation: Correct the breadcrumb hierarchy to reflect Consulting as a top-level section.

findings.title: Product-page breadcrumb hardcoded to Maestro AI URL
findings.description: Position-2 'Urunler' breadcrumb item is hardcoded to /urunler/maestro-ai on every product page, so e.g. the Eye Tracking product falsely claims Maestro AI's URL as its parent.
findings.recommendation: Generate the breadcrumb parent URL dynamically per product instead of a hardcoded value.

findings.title: Hardcoded ASCII breadcrumb labels lose Turkish diacritics
findings.description: "Egitimler"/"Urunler" appear in breadcrumb schema instead of the correct "Eğitimler"/"Ürünler" used elsewhere on the same pages.
findings.recommendation: Fix the hardcoded label strings to use proper Turkish characters.

findings.title: Product/Course schema missing offers/image/hasCourseInstance
findings.description: Both core commercial page types lack fields required for rich-result eligibility.
findings.recommendation: Add offers (with price/currency), image, and for Course pages hasCourseInstance.

findings.title: No SearchAction on WebSite schema
findings.description: Missing sitelinks-searchbox eligibility.
findings.recommendation: Add a SearchAction to the WebSite schema if the site has an internal search.

findings.title: Organization missing ContactPoint/PostalAddress
findings.description: Real phone/address exist on the Contact page but aren't reflected in Organization schema.
findings.recommendation: Add ContactPoint and PostalAddress to Organization schema.

findings.title: Service-page breadcrumbs point to in-page anchors
findings.description: Breadcrumbs reference #services anchors instead of real URLs.
findings.recommendation: Point breadcrumb items at real canonical URLs.

categories.name: Sitemap Structure
what_works: All 6 sub-sitemaps + index are well-formed XML, well under the 50k URL limit
18 spot-checked URLs across all 6 sitemaps returned clean 200s with unique titles
hreflang alternates fully reciprocal in service-, sectoral-, training-, and product-sitemaps

findings.title: Consulting section entirely missing from sitemaps
findings.description: /danismanlik, /en/consulting, /danismanlar, /en/consultants all return live, distinct 200 pages with proper titles but appear in none of the 6 sitemaps.
findings.recommendation: Add to page-sitemap.xml or create a dedicated consulting-sitemap.xml.

findings.title: Sitewide soft-404 undermines sitemap trust
findings.description: Any arbitrary path returns 200 with the generic homepage — this is the same issue flagged under Technical SEO, reducing confidence that all sitemap 200s reflect distinct real content.
findings.recommendation: See Technical SEO soft-404 fix.

findings.title: Identical lastmod across all 73 URLs
findings.description: Every URL shares the exact same millisecond-precision build timestamp rather than real per-page freshness data.
findings.recommendation: Generate lastmod from actual content-edit history where feasible.

findings.title: flow-sitemap.xml URLs lack EN hreflang
findings.description: All 5 flow-sitemap URLs are TR-only with no en alternate.
findings.recommendation: Confirm this is intentional (no EN flow content) or add EN alternates.

categories.name: Performance (Core Web Vitals)
what_works: TTFB consistently good (300-400ms) on all pages tested — Cloudflare edge + prerendering working at the network level
CLS is Good (0.000) on 3 of 4 pages tested

findings.title: LCP fails 'Good' threshold on every page tested
findings.description: Lighthouse lab runs: Home TR 6.55s, Home EN 14.46s, Service page 22.06s, Sectoral page 8.26s — all Poor (threshold ≤2.5s), worsening sharply with template depth.
findings.recommendation: Prior WebP/manualChunks optimizations clearly haven't propagated past the homepage template — audit LCP element and JS blocking on service/sectoral templates specifically.

findings.title: CLS failure on sectoral page template
findings.description: Sectoral page scored 0.854 CLS (Poor, threshold ≤0.1), the only page with a CLS failure, alongside a 9MB/299-request payload (5x the homepage).
findings.recommendation: Highest-priority single fix — identify the shifting element(s) on the sectoral template and reserve layout space; audit why payload is 5x homepage weight.

findings.title: TR homepage has markedly worse TBT than EN
findings.description: TR homepage: 594ms TBT (Poor) with 6.0s main-thread work vs EN homepage's 235ms TBT with 3.2s main-thread work.
findings.recommendation: Investigate TR-specific script/widget difference (e.g. a TR-only third-party embed) causing the doubled main-thread work.

findings.title: ~650KB unused JavaScript shipped on every page
findings.description: Suggests shared vendor chunks (three.js/pdf/analytics) load even on pages that don't need them.
findings.recommendation: Audit manualChunks boundaries; lazy-load three.js/pdf chunks only on routes that use them.

categories.name: AI Search Readiness (GEO)
what_works: llms.txt and llms-full.txt present, well-formed, and current (170 pages, generated 2026-07-10)
AI Answer Box content confirmed server-rendered with question-style headings and direct ~45-word answers
Content-Signal (ai-train=no, use=reference) is compatible with AI citation — doesn't block RAG/retrieval

findings.title: Cloudflare WAF blocks real AI-bot requests regardless of robots.txt
findings.description: Live HTTP requests spoofing AI-bot User-Agent headers were returned HTTP 403 at the Cloudflare edge for ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Perplexity-User, anthropic-ai, and cohere-ai — before robots.txt is even consulted. GPTBot, OAI-SearchBot, and Google-Extended returned 200. Likely the 'AI Scrapers and Crawlers' Bot Management managed rule.
findings.recommendation: Set Cloudflare's AI Crawl Control / Bot Management to Allow for the affected user-agents — this is the dominant blocker, more impactful than the robots.txt text itself.

findings.title: robots.txt duplicate/contradictory groups
findings.description: Same finding as Technical SEO — compounding config smell alongside the WAF block.
findings.recommendation: See Technical SEO recommendation.

findings.title: Organization sameAs missing high-value platforms
findings.description: Only LinkedIn + Instagram present; no YouTube, Reddit, or Wikipedia/Wikidata — YouTube presence correlates most strongly (~0.737) with brand-citation likelihood in AI answers.
findings.recommendation: Add a YouTube channel presence and link it in sameAs if feasible.

findings.title: AI Answer Box shorter than ideal
findings.description: ~45 words per answer box vs the ideal ~134-167 word range for AI-citation passages.
findings.recommendation: Expand answer boxes to the ideal length where it doesn't hurt readability.

phases.name: Phase 1: Critical Fixes
items: Flip Cloudflare AI Crawl Control/Bot Management to Allow for ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Perplexity-User, anthropic-ai, cohere-ai (dashboard-only change)
Consolidate robots.txt into one directive group per user-agent, removing the Cloudflare-managed vs hand-written contradiction
Fix site-wide soft-404 (return real 404 status for unmatched SPA routes)
Fix product-page BreadcrumbList hardcoded Maestro AI URL bug
Fix BreadcrumbList mis-parenting Consulting under Trainings
Remove deprecated HowTo schema
Fix cookie-consent-banner/hero-CTA overlap and the 375px hamburger-button clipping bug

phases.name: Phase 2: High-Impact Improvements
items: Investigate and fix sectoral-page-template CLS failure (0.854) and 9MB payload
Diagnose and reduce LCP across service/sectoral templates (currently 8-22s, all Poor)
Add pricing to all training/course pages
Add /danismanlik, /en/consulting, /danismanlar, /en/consultants to the sitemap
De-templatize sectoral-page FAQs to be genuinely vertical-specific
Fix hardcoded ASCII breadcrumb labels (Egitimler/Urunler → Eğitimler/Ürünler)
Add offers/image to Product schema, hasCourseInstance/offers to Course schema
Investigate TR-homepage TBT regression vs EN homepage (594ms vs 235ms)

phases.name: Phase 3: Content & Authority
items: Add real named case studies with verifiable client metrics across service/sectoral/training pages
Build a credible author/expert bio page + Person schema for Bora Işık
Unify info@khilon.com vs info@khilonfast.com contact email
Add educational/definitional content block to the content-strategy service page to compete against informational SERP intent
Promote CSP from Report-Only to enforced after a reporting burn-in period
Add YouTube presence and reflect in Organization sameAs

phases.name: Phase 4: Monitoring & Iteration
items: Set up canonical-host redirect (http/www → https apex) and edge caching for prerendered HTML
Implement IndexNow for Bing/Yandex/Naver
Derive dateModified/lastmod from real per-page edit history instead of build timestamps
Re-run Lighthouse and AI-bot-UA spot checks monthly to confirm fixes hold
Re-verify Cloudflare AI Crawl Control setting after any WAF/managed-rule updates (Cloudflare periodically resets or updates managed rulesets)
